query: most recent reported population of Vietnam
answer: As of April 2026, Vietnam's population is reported to be 102,092,239 according to Worldometer. The latest United Nations data suggests a population of 101.6 million in 2025. The World Bank estimates the population at 100,987,686 in 2024.
